title: Kaboom Crew — procedural characters (mesh + animation + voice)
summary: Procedural-everything character pipeline for Kaboom Crew avatars: a seeded humanoid mesh generator, six small ECS animation systems (idle bob, walk swing, place-bomb wind-up, hit reaction, victory pose, death rag-doll), and a tiny vocal synth that gives every bomber a unique short voice. Driven by GDP-008/009/010 from S99 game-design output + the saved memory feedback-no-rigged-glb-humanoids. NO Mixamo, NO rigged GLBs — everything generates from code. Multi-sprint track.
doneCriteria: Kaboom Crew bombers use the generated avatar + animation + voice in place of the current primitive mesh
notes: Aligns with the saved memory project-procedural-characters — Mixamo/rigged GLBs are out of scope.
Each story under this epic should land in isolation; the integration into Kaboom Crew is the LAST step, after all three subsystems exist.
